summary_en: eWeLL completed share repurchase of 5,600 shares for ¥10.5M (May 1–15, 2026), concluding the board-authorized program targeting up to 172,000 shares and ¥300M through August 2026.
title_en: Notice of Status of Treasury Stock Acquisition and Completion of Acquisition
translation_en_brief:
eWeLL Co., Ltd. (TSE Growth: 5038) announced the completion of a share repurchase program on May 19, 2026. During the final tranche (May 1–15, 2026), the company acquired 5,600 ordinary shares at a total cost of ¥10,547,200. This concludes the buyback program authorized by the board on February 17, 2026.

The overall program targeted up to 172,000 shares (1.13% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) with a budget ceiling of ¥300 million through August 18, 2026. As of May 15, 2026, cumulative acquisitions reached 140,700 shares at a total cost of ¥299,912,400, effectively consuming the authorized limit. The buyback was executed under Company Law Article 156 (as applied by Article 165(3)) and represents a standard capital allocation to optimize shareholder value.
